title: cynodendron pauciflorum
intro: Cynodendron pauciflorum, also known as the 'Red Alder', is a plant species endemic to New Zealand. It is traditionally used in Maori medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynodendron pauciflorum include relieving respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as treating wounds and skin conditions. The plant's extracts are typically prepared into a herbal tea or infused oil, and it is also used in traditional Maori medicine as a poultice or applied directly to the affected area.
